author: śrī⋅bhaktibhūṣaṇa bhāgabata mahārāja
verses:
hemābha⋅saṅkāśa⋅sucāru gātraṁ
satyasthitaṁ pūta⋅caritra⋅vantam
kāruṇya⋅pūrṇaṁ hi sadā praphullaṁ
vande prabhuṁ bhakti⋅vilāsa⋅tīrtham

saṁsāra⋅santāpa⋅vināśa⋅dakṣaṁ
susnigdha⋅hāsya⋅sphuṭa⋅sundarāsyam
sad⋅bhakti⋅tattvānvita⋅mañju⋅bhāṣaṁ
vande prabhuṁ bhakti⋅vilāsa⋅tīrtham

śrīdhāma⋅māyāpura⋅vaibhavāḍhyaṁ
śrī⋅vigrahārādhana⋅vīthi⋅vijñam
prakhyāta caitanya⋅maṭhābja⋅śobhaṁ
vande prabhuṁ bhakti⋅vilāsa⋅tīrtham

“caitanya⋅vāṇī⋅sadanaṁ” suramyaṁ
saṁsthāpitaṁ jena mahodayena
nirgūḍha⋅māhātmya⋅vibhūṣitaṁ taṁ
vande prabhuṁ bhakti⋅vilāsa⋅tīrtham

tāpa⋅trayonmukta suśānta⋅cittaṁ
dīptaṁ mahā⋅puruṣa⋅cihna⋅lagnam
lokottara⋅nyāsikula⋅pramodaṁ
vande prabhuṁ bhakti⋅vilāsa⋅tīrtham

ātyantika⋅kṣema⋅nikāya⋅nivāsaṁ
śrī⋅rūpa⋅vartmanugataṁ manojñam
śrī⋅gaura⋅līlāmṛta⋅pāna⋅mattaṁ
vande prabhuṁ bhakti⋅vilāsa⋅tīrtham

atyujjvala⋅prema⋅sudhābhiṣiktaṁ
gūḍha⋅vrajāraṇya⋅rahasya⋅prajñam
śrī⋅rādhikā⋅mādhava⋅nāma⋅mugdhaṁ
vande prabhuṁ bhakti⋅vilāsa⋅tīrtham

o viṣṇu⋅pādaṁ nitarāṁ śaraṇyaṁ
śābde pare cātiśaya⋅pravīṇam
nityaṁ suvandyaṁ mama jīvanaṁ taṁ
vande prabhuṁ bhakti⋅vilāsa⋅tīrtham
en_translation:
I offer my respectful obeisances to the lotus feet of Śrīla Bhakti Vilāsa Tīrtha Gosvāmī Mahārāja. His beautiful body is like molten gold, he is established in truth, and he possesses a pure character. He is full of compassion and is always joyful.

I offer my respectful obeisances to the lotus feet of Śrīla Tīrtha Mahārāja. He is expert in destroying the miseries of material existence. His beautiful face is adorned with a gentle smile, and his charming speech is filled with the true principles of devotional service.

I offer my respectful obeisances to the lotus feet of Śrīla Tīrtha Mahārāja. He enriched the glories of Śrīdhāma Māyāpura and was very knowledgeable in the path of Deity worship. He graced the renowned Caitanya Maṭha like a blooming lotus.

I offer my respectful obeisances to the lotus feet of Śrīla Tīrtha Mahārāja. He established the beautiful house of Lord Caitanya's teachings and was adorned with profound spiritual glories.

I offer my respectful obeisances to the lotus feet of Śrīla Tīrtha Mahārāja. His peaceful mind is free from the three-fold miseries, and he shines with the marks of a great personality. He is the joy of the transcendental sannyāsī community.

I offer my respectful obeisances to the lotus feet of Śrīla Tīrtha Mahārāja. He is the abode of ultimate welfare and follows the path of Śrīla Rūpa Gosvāmī. He is intoxicated by drinking the nectar of Lord Gaura's pastimes.

I offer my respectful obeisances to the lotus feet of Śrīla Tīrtha Mahārāja. He is bathed in the most brilliant nectar of divine love and is knowledgeable in the confidential mysteries of the Vṛndāvana forest. He is enchanted by the Names of Śrīmati Rādhikā and Lord Mādhava.

I offer my respectful obeisances to the lotus feet of Śrīla Tīrtha Mahārāja. He is supremely worthy of refuge and is exceedingly expert in the knowledge of transcendental sound. He is my very life.
